title: Update CopyFromPreviousSeason to skip inactive players
description: When copying season data forward, inactive players should not be carried into the new season. Update CopyFromPreviousSeason to skip players where is_active = FALSE when copying player_teams, captains, player_divisions, and player_general_availability. This ensures a clean roster for the new season without manual cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: CopyFromPreviousSeason does not copy player_teams for inactive players
CopyFromPreviousSeason does not copy captains for inactive players
CopyFromPreviousSeason does not copy player_divisions for inactive players
CopyFromPreviousSeason does not copy player_general_availability for inactive players
Active players are copied correctly (no regression)
Teams, divisions, weeks, and other non-player data still copied correctly
If ALL players on a team are inactive, the team is still copied but with an empty roster

approach: 2. Locate the INSERT...SELECT queries that copy player_teams, captains, player_divisions, player_general_availability
3. Add INNER JOIN players p ON p.id = pt.player_id WHERE p.is_active = TRUE to each query
4. Verify teams, divisions, weeks, league_seasons are unaffected
5. Test with a mix of active and inactive players

testing_requirements: Integration test: Copy season with mix of active/inactive players — only active players appear in new season
Integration test: Inactive player's player_teams not copied
Integration test: Inactive captain not copied to new season
Integration test: Active players copied correctly (no regression)
Integration test: Team with all inactive players is still created but has empty roster
Integration test: Divisions, weeks, leagues copied regardless of player status

context.user_story: As an admin starting a new season, I don't want to manually remove players who have already left the club — they should be automatically excluded from the season copy
